zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Thornton於大約1226年出生在英國英格蘭爾桑頓 馬福時，她的父親Lord Randal Thornton22歲，母親Avice de Kingsely27歲。她和Richard de Acton - Lord of Hellesby至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1268年在英國爾利斯比享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Thornton于大约1226年出生在英国英格兰爾桑頓 馬福时，她的父亲Lord Randal Thornton22岁，母亲Avice de Kingsely27岁。她和Richard de Acton - Lord of Hellesby至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1268年在英国爾利斯比享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thornton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England and Scotland so called, from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The placename is most frequent in northern England, especially Yorkshire, where there are at least 16 possible sources for the surname.
Irish: Anglicized (translated) form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin ‘son of Sceachán’ (see Skehan ).
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Draighneáin ‘descendant of Draighneán’ (see Drennan ).

variants.name: Thornber
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the five minor places in Yorkshire called Thornber, particularly Thornber in Halton West. The placenames derive from Old English thorn ‘thorn’ + beorg ‘hill, mound’.
Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’; compare   Thornton  .

variants.name: Thorton
meanings: English: probably a shortened form of   Thornton  , or a habitational name from Thorton in Marnhull, Dorset, which has the same origin.

variants.name: Skehan
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin or Ó Sceacháin ‘son (or descendant) of Sceachán’, a personal name probably based on a diminutive of sceach ‘briar, thorn bush’. The Gaelic name has sometimes been ‘translated’ as Thornton .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Thornton was born about 1226, in Thornton Mayow, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Lord Randal Thornton, was 22 and her mother, Avice de Kingsely, was 27. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Richard de Acton - Lord of Hellesby. She died in 1268, in Helsby, Cheshire, England, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Thornton est née environ 1226, à Thornton Mayow, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Randal Thornton, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Avice de Kingsely, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Richard de Acton - Lord of Hellesby. Elle est décédée en 1268, à Helsby, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.Thornton, Cheshire, England: Thornton Mayow, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Thornton um 1226 in Thornton Mayow, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Randal Thornton 22 und ihre Mutter Avice de Kingsely 27. Sie hatte mit Richard de Acton - Lord of Hellesby mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1268 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Helsby, Cheshire, England.

Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Richard de Acton - Lord of Hellesby. Morì nel 1268, nel Helsby, Cheshire, England, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Thorntonが約1226年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアソルントン メイオウで生まれた時，父Lord Randal Thorntonは22歳，母Avice de Kingselyは27歳であった。彼女はRichard de Acton - Lord of Hellesbyとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1268年にイギリスチェシュアイアヘルスビーで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Thornton(이)가 대략 1226년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 토른턴 메이요에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Randal Thornton(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Avice de Kingsely(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Richard de Acton - Lord of Hellesby(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1268년 영국 체실르 헬스비에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Thornton родилась около 1226 г. в местности таурнтон меиоу, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Lord Randal Thornton было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Avice de Kingsely, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Richard de Acton - Lord of Hellesby. Она умерла в 1268 г. в местности хелсби, чешир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет.
